Stripe Vercel Linear Notion Figma Slack GitHub Shopify Airbnb Netflix

Your team deserves better than scattered tools

Switching between Slack, Notion, Jira, and email costs your team hours every day. Context switching kills productivity and frustrates everyone. Your best work happens when everything flows together.

🔄

Chaos → Order

🔗

Connect

Bring all your tools together. Integrate Slack, GitHub, Figma, and 100+ more apps in seconds.

📋

Organize

Structure your workspace with boards, lists, and cards. Drag and drop to prioritize.

💬

Collaborate

Work together in real-time. See changes as they happen with live cursors and instant sync.

🚀

Ship

Deliver faster, together. Track progress, automate workflows, and celebrate wins.

Built for how teams actually work

Every feature designed to remove friction and amplify your team's output.

Smart Workspace Mockup

Smart Workspaces

One place for everything. Customize your workspace with boards, docs, chat, and files — all connected.

  • ✓ Customizable board views
  • ✓ Built-in document editor
  • ✓ Threaded conversations

Real-time Collaboration

See changes as they happen. Live cursors, instant sync, and zero lag — even with 50 people editing.

  • ✓ Live multi-user editing
  • ✓ Presence indicators
  • ✓ Version history & restore
Live Collaboration Mockup
Automation Workflow Mockup

Powerful Automations

Let the routine run itself. Build workflows that trigger on events, schedules, or conditions.

  • ✓ Visual workflow builder
  • ✓ 200+ pre-built templates
  • ✓ Conditional logic & branching

Works with the tools you already love

Connect 100+ apps in seconds. Your existing stack, supercharged.

No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.

For small teams getting started

Free

  • ✓ 5 workspaces
  • ✓ Basic integrations

Pro

For growing teams

$15/user/mo
  • ✓ Unlimited members
  • ✓ Unlimited workspaces

Enterprise

For large organizations

Custom
  • ✓ Everything in Pro
  • ✓ SSO & SAML
